name: Cherry Upside Down Cake-- G.birr
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the 1/4 cup margarine in a 9-inch pan.
2. Add the cherries mixed with half a cup of sugar.
3. To make the cake, mix together the flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, salt, beaten egg, and milk.
4. Stir in the melted shortening (3 tablespoons).
5. Bake for about 30 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Immediately after baking, invert the cake onto a serving plate.
